title: Class lists for the 2025-2026 school year are published
body: The official class assignments for grades 10, 11, and 12 are now available. Please check your homeroom and report on the first day.
author: Principal Vo

title: Annual Science Festival - June 20
body: Join us for the Science Festival featuring student projects, experiments, and guest speakers. All students and parents are welcome.
author: Principal Vo

title: Library extended hours during exam season
body: The library will stay open until 20:00 on weekdays from June 5 to June 30 to support exam preparation.
author: Principal Vo
